notes: Backward compatible: new Extraction fields use serde(default), existing deserialization unaffected
TaskContext is opt-in: when no existing tasks, behavior is identical to before
Status update detection is AI-driven: relies on model to judge, with logging for observability

implementation_summary.approach: Pass existing Pending tasks as context to AI model during task discovery
key_changes: Added TaskContext struct (wb-ai/adapter.rs) for passing task summaries to AI
Added is_status_update and related_task_id to Extraction struct with serde(default)
Modified anthropic/openai extract prompts to include task context and request new fields
Modified discover_with_ai() to accept existing_tasks parameter
TaskDiscovery now auto-builds context from pending tasks before calling AI
When AI returns is_status_update=true, no new task is created
implementation_summary.data_flow: Pipeline -> TaskDiscovery.discover_with_ai() -> builds TaskContext from pending -> discovery_ai.discover_with_ai() -> creates synthetic event with task_context in content -> adapter.extract() -> AI sees existing tasks -> returns is_status_update if applicable
